name: mcp-server-mcpindex
description: The MCP directory that vets servers, not just lists them: find one by task, then screen a tool before an agent calls it. Advisory, conformance-monitored, not a safety verdict.
long_description: mcpindex is the MCP directory that vets servers, not just lists them. Find the right server for a task (ranked picks with install commands and quality scores), then screen a specific tool or a whole server before an agent calls it: check_tool_trust and assess_server return an advisory verdict (REVIEW / UNVERIFIED at v1) backed by conformance monitoring and a live drift ledger, and fail closed to human review. Zero-config: queries the public mcpindex.ai API, no credentials. Monitored, not enforced; advisory, not a safety verdict and not an in-path gate.

api_base.title: API base URL
api_base.description: Override the mcpindex API base if you self-host. Leave as the default otherwise.
